/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TicTacToe.dir/tictactoe.cpp.o -o TicTacToe.app/Contents/MacOS/TicTacToe  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.2.6.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.2.6.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-network.2.6.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.2.6.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.2.6.2.dylib
